summary: A Fox News split-screen interview with DHS Public Affairs Asst Secretary Tricia McLaughlin defending the removal of an alleged MS-13 member and criticizing media framing of him as a 'Maryland father.' It is a talking-head news interview, not a stylized or music-driven produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS PUBLIC AFFAIRS ASST SECRETARY; JUDGE ORDERS RETURN OF MD MAN SENT TO EL SALVADOR; FOX NEWS ALERT
